Simple, Transparent Pricing

Loading current pricing…

Frequently Asked Questions

Can I cancel anytime?

Yes! You can cancel your subscription at any time. You'll continue to have access until the end of your billing period.

Is there a free trial?

Yes — every new account gets a 7-day free trial of the full app. No credit card required to start.

What payment methods do you accept?

We accept all major credit cards, Apple Pay, and Google Pay through our secure payment processor.

Can I switch plans?

Absolutely! You can upgrade or downgrade your plan at any time. Changes take effect on your next billing cycle.

Ready to start tracking?

Join thousands of users who've made fitness tracking effortless.

Get Started Free
Contact Privacy Terms
